title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Kaido, Unknown person #8, Yamato as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can you be so cold- hearted, abandoning me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, I can't lose myself!! I have to stay strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No, I have to do this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This oversized bomb must not go off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm heading back to the skull dome!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I may be able to minimize the potential destruction!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...are kept in the base- ment's giant armory!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I don't do some- thing about them now,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then the number of casualties will be exponentially higher should the worst happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You intend to leave me here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm counting on you, MOMONO- Suke-KUN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Get serious and use it already!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
